  "findings": [
    "Missing bolts in two adjacent flange holes",
    "Uneven thread projection on installed bolts",
    "No torque witness marks visible on the assembly"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install the missing bolts of the correct specification",
    "Re-torque all bolts in the correct pattern to the specified torque value",
    "Ensure even thread projection of at least 1 to 3 threads beyond the nut",
    "Apply torque witness marks to all nuts after final torque verification"
  ],
  "rationale": "The flanged joint is missing two adjacent bolts, which prevents proper gasket compression and will cause a leak or blowout during hydrotest. Additionally, uneven thread projection and lack of torque witness marks violate ASME PCC-1 guidelines for bolted flange joint assembly.",
  "references": [
    "ASME PCC-1 Guidelines for Pressure Boundary Bolted Flange Joint Assembly",
    "ASME B16.5 Pipe Flanges and Flanged Fittings"
  ]
